hero.headline: Asia's #1 Valorant App
hero.subheadline: Real-time shop tracking, deep match analytics, and 800K+ players — DailyVal is the app you'll open more than the game itself.

items.title: Daily Shop Tracker
items.description: Get notified the moment new skins drop. Preview the full shop without launching the game — no more missing the bundle you've been waiting for.

items.title: Deep Match Analytics
items.description: KDA, headshot rate, map win rates, rank progression — all in one place. Pinpoint your weak spots and improve with purpose, not just volume.

items.title: Player Community
items.description: Share highlights, discuss strats, find teammates. Asia's largest Valorant community lives right inside DailyVal.

community.title: 800K Players and Counting
community.description: Whether you're new to Valorant or grinding your way up the leaderboard, DailyVal's community board connects you with players who get it. Share your highlights, ask for tips, or just talk some ranked.

items.quote: Checking the daily shop on DailyVal is faster than opening the game. I get notified the second limited skins go live — haven't missed a bundle I wanted since I started using it.
items.author: ShopAddict_SG

items.quote: The KDA and headshot trend charts showed me exactly which agents I wasn't comfortable on. Two weeks of focused practice later, I went from Gold to Platinum.
items.author: SovaMaster_SG

items.quote: The community feels way more approachable than Reddit. Finding teammates and talking strats is actually enjoyable here. It's been my daily-open app for almost a year.
items.author: TaiwanPeak_EN

finalCta.headline: Start Playing Smarter Today
finalCta.description: Free to download. Sync your Valorant account instantly. Shop, stats, and community — all in one place.

home.title: DailyVal — Asia's #1 Valorant App
home.description: Trusted by 800K+ players. Daily shop tracking, match analytics, and player community. Free on the App Store.
